surfaces: docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml — all financially-relevant path entries missing FinancialValue $ref + GET /shift-intelligence/alerts path entry birth (DEC-6)
coverage_mode.full_mode_justification: Enforcement class and dedicated inventory rollout slice — documenting all financially-relevant routes post-canonicalization (GOV-FIB-001 §6.3)

layer_budget.secondary_layer_constraints: none — no secondary layer receives logic changes
layer_budget.dto_classification: no DTO changes in this slice

scope_guardrail.one_line_boundary: This FIB documents the Q-5-audited financially-relevant route contract in api-surface.openapi.yaml and expands route-boundary test coverage to route-appropriate matrices; it does not change service output, UI rendering, or wire runtime observability.

diff_size_sanity.multi_boundary_justification: Full/Enforcement classification: a full inventory pass across all financially-relevant routes requires touching test files in each affected route directory. 5 files, 5 directory boundaries, 4 bounded contexts — all within §11 file threshold (5–7). Scale is linear across bounded contexts: each contributes one route test file and zero service changes. No logic change in any file requires knowledge of another file's change.

adjacent_consequence_ledger.temptation: Structured log events per deprecated-field usage at route handlers
adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: Route handler directories are adjacent while birthing alerts test; observability is a natural follow-on
Enforcement infrastructure that follows stable contract documentation

adjacent_consequence_ledger.temptation: CI gate for OpenAPI envelope regression
adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: Natural after contract is fully documented and tested

adjacent_consequence_ledger.temptation: Expand all shift-dashboards route test families beyond DEF-005 named routes
adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: Route directories exist and are nearby while touching shift-intelligence tests

phase_boundary.one_line_invariant: If a change annotates financially-relevant OpenAPI paths with FinancialValue refs, births or expands route-boundary tests to 4-case matrices, or closes DEF-005 / DEC-6 tracker items — and nothing else — it is in scope.
concrete_in_scope_openapi_targets: docs/25-api-data/api-surface.openapi.yaml — all financially-relevant path entries missing FinancialValue $ref (Q-5 audit step confirms complete list)
stop_conditions: FinancialValue component structurally expanded beyond integer-cents documentation/type correction
prohibited: Expanding shift-dashboards route test families beyond DEF-005 named routes

intent.operator_problem: After Phase 1.2B-A retired BRIDGE-001 and promoted ShiftAlertDTO to a discriminated union, the API surface contract documentation and test coverage are stale in three ways: (1) most financially-relevant route path entries in api-surface.openapi.yaml describe financial fields as bare number rather than referencing the FinancialValue component; (2) GET /shift-intelligence/alerts has no path entry in the OpenAPI at all (DEC-6) despite the route handler being live and ShiftAlertDTO being promoted; (3) route-boundary tests for recent-sessions and live-view cover only spot-check shape assertions from Phase 1.2A, not 4-case boundary matrices (DEF-005).
intent.pilot_fit: Contract documentation and test matrices are Enforcement work that follows a stable service contract. Phase 1.2B-A established stability. The OpenAPI must be accurate before Phase 1.3 UI component design begins — that phase uses the spec as its reference. DEF-005 was deliberately deferred from Phase 1.2A to avoid documenting a changing contract.
intent.parallel_note: Phase 1.2B-B (UI render migration) can run concurrently. The render migration touches only start-from-previous.tsx; this FIB touches only api-surface.openapi.yaml and route __tests__ files. Zero shared files.

entities.name: api-surface.openapi.yaml
entities.description: OpenAPI specification for all PT-2 API routes — the authoritative contract reference for consumers and Phase 1.3 UI design
entities.financial_relevance: Path entries for financially-relevant routes must reference FinancialValue component schema after Phase 1.2B-A canonicalization

entities.name: FinancialValue component
entities.description: Already defined in api-surface.openapi.yaml; integer-cents value with type, source, completeness envelope
entities.financial_relevance: All financial field annotations in path entries must $ref this component; stale value semantics may be corrected to integer cents, but no new component fields are introduced

entities.name: ShiftAlertDTO
entities.description: Discriminated union promoted in Phase 1.2B-A; financial metric types carry FinancialValue|null; ratio branch metricType 'hold_percent' keeps metric values bare number|null (DEF-NEVER)
entities.financial_relevance: DEC-6 path entry must accurately describe the promoted discriminated-union shape

entities.name: ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json DEF-005
entities.description: Deferred register item for full 4-case route-boundary test matrices on recent-sessions and live-view routes
entities.financial_relevance: Closure with commit SHA confirms Enforcement phase complete

boundaries: No service layer changes — Phase 1.2B-A complete
No FinancialValue component structural expansion — only stale integer-cents documentation/type semantics may be corrected

capabilities.name: Q-5 OpenAPI audit
capabilities.description: Grep api-surface.openapi.yaml for all financially-relevant field names (buy_in, cash_out, net, observedValue, baselineMedian, baselineMad, thresholdValue, totalCashOut) without adjacent FinancialValue $ref — confirms complete list of unannotated path entries
capabilities.output: Complete inventory of unannotated financially-relevant routes

capabilities.name: OpenAPI annotation — existing paths
capabilities.description: Add $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue' to all financially-relevant fields in unannotated path entries; replace bare number schema entries
capabilities.output: All financially-relevant routes reference FinancialValue component

capabilities.name: DEC-6 path entry birth — GET /shift-intelligence/alerts
capabilities.description: Add GET /shift-intelligence/alerts path entry with ShiftAlertDTO schema: metricType discriminant present; explicit oneOf branches (or reusable equivalent component schemas) require metricType, observedValue, baselineMedian, and baselineMad in both branches; financial metric branches expose metric values as FinancialValue|null; ratio branch metricType 'hold_percent' exposes metric values as bare number|null (DEF-NEVER); thresholdValue is absent
capabilities.output: DEC-6 gap closed; alerts route documented in OpenAPI

capabilities.name: recent-sessions 4-case test matrix
capabilities.description: Extend existing route.test.ts: 401 unauthorized, invalid params, empty result for missing/cross-tenant/no-session player state, success asserting integer-cents FinancialValue on total_buy_in / total_cash_out / net
capabilities.output: recent-sessions route test covers full 4-case boundary

capabilities.name: live-view 4-case test matrix
capabilities.description: Extend existing route.test.ts: 401 unauthorized, 404 visit-not-found, service error, success asserting integer-cents FinancialValue on session_total_buy_in / session_total_cash_out / session_net
capabilities.output: live-view route test covers full 4-case boundary

capabilities.name: shift-intelligence/alerts route test birth
capabilities.description: Birth app/api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts/__tests__/route.test.ts: 401 unauthorized, invalid or missing gaming_day query, empty array result, ratio-branch ShiftAlertDTO with metricType 'hold_percent' asserting bare numeric metric fields, success with financial-branch ShiftAlertDTO asserting FinancialValue|null on observedValue / baselineMedian / baselineMad plus absence of thresholdValue and standalone hold_percent fields
capabilities.output: alerts route test born; DEC-6 test obligation satisfied

capabilities.name: anomaly-alerts test expansion
capabilities.description: Extend services/shift-intelligence/__tests__/anomaly-alerts-route-boundary.test.ts to 4-case matrix matching discriminated-union shape from Phase 1.2B-A: observedValue / baselineMedian / baselineMad / thresholdValue as FinancialValue|null; hold_percent as bare number|null
capabilities.output: anomaly-alerts test aligned to promoted DTO shape

capabilities.name: DEF-005 + DEC-6 tracker closure + quality gates
capabilities.description: Update ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json: close DEF-005 with commit SHA, add DEC-6 to resolved decisions. Run npm run type-check + npm run lint + npm run build.
capabilities.output: Tracker updated; quality gates pass; Phase 1.2B-C exit gate met

actors.name: API consumer / frontend developer
actors.role: Reads api-surface.openapi.yaml to understand wire contract for financially-relevant routes; depends on accurate FinancialValue annotations

actors.name: Route test suite
actors.role: Asserts 4-case boundary matrix at each financially-relevant route; catches regressions against the stable integer-cents contract

trigger_events.description: Phase 1.2B-A exit gate passed (EXEC-074 commit e83a2c12, 2026-04-30): FinancialValue.value is integer cents, ShiftAlertDTO is a discriminated union — service contract is stable and ready to document
DEF-005 is open: full 4-case route-boundary test matrices for recent-sessions and live-view are absent; spot-check BRIDGE-001 assertions from Phase 1.2A are insufficient post-canonicalization

DEC-6 from EXEC-074: GET /shift-intelligence/alerts route handler is live at app/api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts/route.ts and ShiftAlertDTO was promoted in Phase 1.2B-A, but no OpenAPI path entry exists

rules.description: FinancialValue fields in OpenAPI path entries must use $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue' — bare number is incorrect for integer-cents fields after Phase 1.2B-A
hold_percent must remain a ratio discriminant/semantic branch and must never be wrapped as FinancialValue — DEF-NEVER hard invariant survives all phases
GET /shift-intelligence/alerts must have a path entry in the OpenAPI — route handler exists, ShiftAlertDTO is promoted, documentation gap is DEC-6 recorded in EXEC-074

Route-boundary tests must cover route-appropriate 4-case matrices: auth failure, validation or not-found where supported, empty/service-error, success with full financial shape — spot-check only is insufficient post-canonicalization
Success case must assert integer-cents FinancialValue shape: value is integer (not dollar-float), type/source/completeness.status present — no BRIDGE-001 style assertions

alerts route test must verify the discriminated union and query validation: missing/invalid gaming_day fails validation; ratio branch metricType 'hold_percent' carries bare numeric metric values; financial branches carry FinancialValue|null; thresholdValue and standalone hold_percent fields are absent
DEF-005 must be closed in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with implementation commit SHA after all route test expansions are verified green

invariants: hold_percent is never FinancialValue in any OpenAPI schema (DEF-NEVER)
FinancialValue component may only correct stale integer-cents documentation/type semantics; no new component fields
No service logic changes — this FIB documents the output of Phase 1.2B-A; it does not alter it
Phase 1.2B-B (render migration) and Phase 1.2B-C (this FIB) share zero files and may execute concurrently

containment_loop.action: Run Q-5 audit: grep api-surface.openapi.yaml for financially-relevant field names (buy_in, cash_out, net, observedValue, baselineMedian, baselineMad, thresholdValue, totalCashOut) without adjacent $ref to FinancialValue component
containment_loop.system_response: Complete list of unannotated financially-relevant path entries identified

containment_loop.action: Annotate each unannotated financially-relevant path entry with $ref: '#/components/schemas/FinancialValue' for each financial field; replace bare number schema entries
containment_loop.system_response: All financially-relevant routes reference FinancialValue component; bare number replaced where FinancialValue is the correct type

containment_loop.action: Add GET /shift-intelligence/alerts path entry to api-surface.openapi.yaml: metricType discriminant present; explicit oneOf branches (or reusable equivalent component schemas) require metricType, observedValue, baselineMedian, and baselineMad in both branches; financial metric branches expose metric values as FinancialValue|null; ratio branch metricType 'hold_percent' exposes metric values as bare number|null (DEF-NEVER); thresholdValue is absent
containment_loop.system_response: DEC-6 path gap closed; api-surface.openapi.yaml now documents the alerts route with the correct promoted ShiftAlertDTO shape

containment_loop.action: Extend app/api/v1/players/[playerId]/recent-sessions/__tests__/route.test.ts with 4 cases: 401 unauthorized, invalid params, empty result for missing/cross-tenant/no-session player state, success asserting integer-cents FinancialValue shape on total_buy_in / total_cash_out / net
containment_loop.system_response: recent-sessions route test covers full boundary matrix; success case asserts FinancialValue.value is integer

containment_loop.action: Extend app/api/v1/visits/[visitId]/live-view/__tests__/route.test.ts with 4 cases: 401 unauthorized, 404 visit-not-found, service error, success asserting integer-cents FinancialValue shape on session_total_buy_in / session_total_cash_out / session_net
containment_loop.system_response: live-view route test covers full boundary matrix; success case asserts FinancialValue.value is integer

containment_loop.action: Birth app/api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts/__tests__/route.test.ts with invalid-query coverage and branch assertions: 401 unauthorized, invalid or missing gaming_day query, empty array result, ratio-branch ShiftAlertDTO with metricType 'hold_percent' asserting bare numeric metric fields, success with financial-branch ShiftAlertDTO asserting FinancialValue|null on observedValue / baselineMedian / baselineMad plus absence of thresholdValue and standalone hold_percent fields
containment_loop.system_response: alerts route test born; discriminated-union contract asserted; DEC-6 test obligation satisfied

containment_loop.action: Extend services/shift-intelligence/__tests__/anomaly-alerts-route-boundary.test.ts to 4-case matrix aligned to discriminated-union shape from Phase 1.2B-A: observedValue / baselineMedian / baselineMad / thresholdValue as FinancialValue|null; hold_percent as bare number|null
containment_loop.system_response: anomaly-alerts test expanded; FinancialValue|null discriminated-union shape fully asserted

containment_loop.action: Update ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json: set DEF-005 status to closed with implementation commit SHA; add DEC-6 to resolved decisions list
containment_loop.system_response: Tracker updated; Phase 1.2B-C deferred items closed

containment_loop.action: Run npm run type-check, npm run lint, npm run build
containment_loop.system_response: All quality gates exit 0; Phase 1.2B-C exit gate met

success_outcomes.description: All financially-relevant path entries in api-surface.openapi.yaml reference FinancialValue component for financial fields
GET /shift-intelligence/alerts path entry present in api-surface.openapi.yaml with correct ShiftAlertDTO discriminated-union schema (DEC-6 closed)
hold_percent is never wrapped as FinancialValue; ratio-branch metric values remain bare number|null in all OpenAPI schemas — DEF-NEVER enforced in documentation, no exceptions
recent-sessions and live-view route tests each have 4-case boundary matrix; success cases assert integer-cents FinancialValue shape
shift-intelligence/alerts route test born with invalid-query coverage plus discriminated-union branch assertions; anomaly-alerts test expanded to match promoted DTO
DEF-005 closed in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with implementation commit SHA
npm run type-check, npm run lint, npm run build all exit 0

operator_problem_to_loop_step: Stale OpenAPI bare-number annotations on financially-relevant routes → steps 1–2 (Q-5 audit + annotation)
Missing 4-case route test matrices for recent-sessions and live-view (DEF-005) → steps 4–5
Missing alerts route test and stale anomaly-alerts test → steps 6–7
